title: ononis natrix subvar. clausoniana
intro: Ononis natrix subvar. clausoniana, also known as Clauson's Restharrow, is a plant species in the genus Ononis, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, Clauson's Restharrow has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its saponin and alkaloid content. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving urinary tract issues, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting the immune system. Clauson's Restharrow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
